verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Have the pre-eminence That you desire In our lives, in our lives. Have the pre-eminence That you desire In our lives, in our lives.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Work with our hands, Speak with our lips, See with our eyes, And walk with our feet. Have the pre-eminence That you desire In our lives, in our lives.
